bio: Hi there, my name is Rodrigo Mady and I'm a full-stack developer.
cite: Every dream you leave behind is a piece of the future that ceases to exist
footerdesc: Looking for an experienced full-stack developer to build your distance learning website? To start an initial chat, just drop me a message:
footertitle: Interested in hiring me for your project?
htmldesc: More than 7 years of experience doing frontend. My main Open Source project is the Theme Trema for Moodle. I did him using SASS and Mustaches. Tailwind is part of my stack.
javascriptdesc: 6 years of experience working with Vanilla and libs. Two years with React (Next.js). Worked a little bit with Vue.Js. And did the Bootcamp in BairesDev with NodeJS(Express/NestJS).
ownbussiness: I have my own small business as a freelancer and CEO at RMady Technology. Focus on distance learning development projects with data analysis, updating, backend, frontend, management, implantation, implementation, infrastructure, installation, migration, testing, and training using the LMS Moodle
ownbussinesslink: Awesome, I want to make contact with RMady Technology
phpdesc: Moodle is my main skill, I have more than 10 years of experience working with it and making some lectures. I had a minor experience working with CakePHP and Laravel.
roledescription: Full Stack Developer of PHP, Node, React, and Vue. Ten years of experience with the Moodle platform. Self-taught programmer for six years. Four years of experience with Back-end and Front-end. Open Source Enthusiast. Creator and maintainer of Theme Trema. An active member of the Moodle Brazil Community
skillsdescription: I have more than 10 years of experience working with distance learning web applications. Below is a quick overview of my main technical skill sets and the tools I use. Want to find out more about my experience?
sqldesc: My first experience in the development world started with SQL and dynamic reports, since then I worked with: PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle and SQL Server.
talk1: How Theme Can Solve Your Problems
talk2: Moodle Themes - How it provides more convenience for the end-user
talk4: Moodle Experience - what do we want to promote
talksdesc: As Linux user and maintainer of theme Trema sharing my knowloged is a great way to learn more.
tremadesc: Discover Trema, a theme for Moodle LMS boasting a modern design and useful customization options that are perfect for education institutions, all levels of government, businesses, and non-profits. Trema is more than just a theme — it's a platform enhancer. Whether you're looking to revamp a content-rich Moodle site or create a fresh learning environment, Trema's features are designed to elevate your platform. Don't settle for ordinary; choose Trema to create an engaging learning experience for your staff, business partners, and customers today.
whatididdesc: Below is a quick overview of my main technical skill sets and technologies I used in those companies.
